codeReview.summary: The commit removes the duplicated Tauri-local AppState/Mutex<HashMap> store and migrates commands to tauri::State<Arc<SessionStore>> with shared SessionStore accessors. Updated wrapper tests (including a new SessionStore-specific test) validate that command calls and direct store access operate on the same backend session state, and the handoff/transcript evidence shows required validation commands were run successfully.

summary: Reviewed feature m5-migrate-tauri-to-session-store for commit 9a0a8ea128c2346390c5a1f19e1a4764bcbf48ed: requirements for removing duplicated Tauri session storage and migrating to shared SessionStore usage are met, with no blocking or non-blocking code issues identified.
